login.title: Welcome back!
login.subtitle: Sign in to your Gold's Gym account

register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Join Gold's Gym France
register.checkEmailDesc: A confirmation link has been sent to your email address. Click it to activate your account.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password?
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.emailSentDesc: A reset link has been sent to {{email}}. Also check your spam folder.

resetPassword.title: New password
resetPassword.description: Choose a strong password to secure your account.

mfa.title: Two-factor authentication
mfa.subtitle: Secure your account with TOTP (Google Authenticator, Authy…)
mfa.scanQRDesc: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy…)
mfa.enterCodeDesc: Open your authenticator app and enter the 6-digit code.
